recommended_prompt_fixes.composition: vary subject scale and placement; avoid fixed centered two-thirds portrait framing
recommended_prompt_fixes.anatomy: Natural human proportions, head size anatomically proportional to body, realistic neck length, balanced shoulder width, no oversized head, no doll-like head, no pasted face, coherent body pose.
recommended_prompt_fixes.identity: Preserve the exact recognizable face identity from the reference image, same facial structure, same eyes, nose, mouth, and face shape. Do not beautify into a different person. Match face color, skin tone, lighting direction, and grain with the body and environment.
recommended_prompt_fixes.source_cleanup: Use original photos only as source references; avoid using prior generated outputs as new source images.
recommended_prompt_fixes.style_direction: Keep the travel blockbuster feeling: beautiful, glamorous, cinematic, scene-rich, magazine-grade. Preserve sci-fi, cyberpunk, fantasy, xianxia, starry sky, futuristic city, mythic palace, grand nature, and high-fashion travel styles. Avoid erotic styling without making the image plain or conservative.
